description: Ory provides identity and access management products for authentication, OAuth2/OIDC, authorization, permissions, and related security use cases. It is available as a managed cloud service and as self-hosted open-source or enterprise deployments.
summary: Ory exposes a REST API for its identity/authz platform, an `ory` CLI, and a hosted docs MCP server; docs also state Ory Permissions supports gRPC APIs, but no separate public gRPC connection details were confirmed here.
